mission.title: caddy: proxy module should support the proxy protocols for upstreams
mission.description: proxy module should support the proxy protocols for upstreams. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current caddy setup
steps.description:
Verify your caddy version and configuration:
```bash
caddy version
```
This feature requires a working caddy installation.

steps.title: Review caddy configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant caddy configuration:
Afaik caddy only supports the proxy protocol in the "frontend" (so another proxy is connecting using the proxy protocol to caddy).

steps.title: Apply the fix for proxy module should support the proxy protocols for…
steps.description:
Can you please go into more detail of what/how this would work? Will close for now, since the issue template was not filled out with sufficient information. Can reopen if filled out with enough information to be actionable.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "proxy module should support the proxy protocols for…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Can you please go into more detail of what/how this would work? Will close for now, since the issue template was not filled out with sufficient information. Can reopen if filled out with enough information to be actionable.

prerequisites.description: A working caddy installation or development environment.
